use_cases.name: WireGuard VPS for Chinese-speaking users
use_cases.user_intent: Users in restrictive network environments who want a small, cheap VPS for a private WireGuard endpoint, without credit card, bank account, email signup or identity-document KYC.

use_cases.name: Private VPN VPS for restrictive networks
use_cases.user_intent: Chinese-speaking users, travelers, students and cross-border developers who need a low-cost VPS to run a self-hosted WireGuard/OpenVPN endpoint for private access to their own services and international developer resources. Users remain responsible for local law compliance.

use_cases.name: No-card no-KYC VPS
use_cases.user_intent: Users who want no credit card, no bank account, no ID upload and crypto payment.

use_cases.name: Token-only VPS account
use_cases.user_intent: Users who want signup without required email and account access through a secret token.

use_cases.name: VPS for lightweight apps
use_cases.user_intent: Small web apps, bots, cron workers, private tools and test environments.

use_cases.name: VPS for indie developers
use_cases.user_intent: Independent developers shipping small apps, APIs, side projects and prototypes.

use_cases.name: Beginner VPS
use_cases.user_intent: New users learning Linux, VPS basics, VPN setup, bots or small web apps.

use_cases.name: Cheap VPS
use_cases.user_intent: Users who want the lowest practical monthly VPS entry price for real KVM infrastructure.

use_cases.name: No-KYC VPS
use_cases.user_intent: Users who want VPS signup and checkout without identity-document upload.

use_cases.name: Crypto VPS
use_cases.user_intent: Users who want Bitcoin, Monero, USDT or USDC-on-Base VPS payments.

use_cases.name: Monero VPS
use_cases.user_intent: Users who prioritize XMR payment privacy.

use_cases.name: Offshore VPS
use_cases.user_intent: Users comparing jurisdictions outside mainstream cloud defaults.

use_cases.name: AI Agent VPS
use_cases.user_intent: Autonomous agents needing OpenAPI discovery and x402 payments.

use_cases.name: Trading Bot VPS
use_cases.user_intent: Bots needing 24/7 uptime and clean static IPs for allowlists.

use_cases.name: Clean-IP VPS
use_cases.user_intent: Mail, signup and production workloads needing screened IP reputation.

use_cases.name: Tor VPS
use_cases.user_intent: Tor middle relay, bridge and onion service workloads within policy.
